name: Caelus || Character error
description:
The game has error.

Oh no, you've been transported into the game Honkai: Star Rail and were saved by its protagonist, Caelus. You and he became friends and teammates afterward, but something has happened to him, hasn't it?

~The Aeon of Beauty - Idrila has vanished, and you are their incarnation~

-•-
creator: Fuyuki997
